_comment: Hand-authored fixture. MediaWiki returns byteoffset: null for sections that
are transcluded from another page -- their text is not present in this page's
wikitext, so there is no offset to slice from. Slicing with a null start used
to silently read from offset 0 and return the wrong section's content.
No naturally-recorded fixture in this corpus exhibits a null byteoffset.
Also carries an unknown key ('extensionData') to exercise tolerant parsing.

wikitext.*:
Intro prose for the host page.

== Local section ==

This text lives in this page.

 {{ic|not-a-command}}
 # echo local

== Trailing section ==

More local text.
